mode.description: Limiter behavior when the budget is exhausted. 'reject' vetoes and emits a single gate.llm.retry once the window ages out. 'queue' buffers up to queue.max_pending retry slots and drains them at the configured rate; excess is rejected.

window_seconds.description: Length of the rolling window in seconds.

pause_message.description: Message logged when the limiter pauses dispatch.

queue.description: Queue-mode tuning. Ignored when mode is 'reject'.

max_pending.description: Maximum buffered retry slots before further requests are rejected outright.
